should_trigger: Help me design a PiP overlay app that watches my screen and coaches me while I play

Create a memory-reading trainer for single-player cheats

note: This set was authored during forging, not run through forge.py triggers (not available in this environment). Run `python scripts/forge.py triggers game-point-builder` locally to get a measured rate before publishing a numeric trigger-accuracy claim.
